_purpose: Atomic decomposition map per HK212 028a..f principle. Composite skladby/fixtures → atomic coded operations. items.json frozen NOT touched.

_pattern_compliance.pattern_15: Work-First — atomic operations are codeable units; catalog matching downstream
_pattern_compliance.pattern_26: Família-level URS where leaf unknown + status flag; NO fabrication
_pattern_compliance.pattern_28: (id, kapitola) compound key — handles PSV76.003 ×3 + VRN.001 ×9 collisions
_pattern_compliance.pattern_32: Separate deliverable — does not modify File A audit or items.json
